templates: Not much is said about {name} in {town}, which is either because there is nothing to say or because {pronoun} prefers it that way. {personality_line} {hook}
{name} arrived in {town} {years} years ago and never left, though {pronoun} sometimes looks like {pronoun} is still deciding. {personality_line} {hook}

personality_lines.brave: {pronoun_cap} is the kind of person others look to when things go wrong.
personality_lines.cautious: {pronoun_cap} watches the road from {pronoun_pos} doorstep each evening.
personality_lines.greedy: {pronoun_cap} knows the value of what {pronoun} has and what {pronoun} doesn't.
personality_lines.generous: {pronoun_cap} helps where {pronoun} can, and doesn't keep count of it.
personality_lines.curious: {pronoun_cap} asks more questions than most people like.
personality_lines.suspicious: {pronoun_cap} is slow to trust and careful about it.
personality_lines.loyal: The people {name} calls friends are few, but certain of it.
personality_lines.mercenary: {pronoun_cap} has a practical view of obligation.
personality_lines.pious: {pronoun_cap} attends services without fail and takes it seriously.
personality_lines.cynical: {pronoun_cap} has seen enough to have formed opinions, and has mostly stopped sharing them.
personality_lines.cheerful: {pronoun_cap} gets on with things and doesn't make much of difficulties.
personality_lines.melancholy: There is a loss somewhere in {pronoun_pos} past that still shows if you know to look.
personality_lines.hot-tempered: {pronoun_cap} is slow to anger but quick once there.
personality_lines.patient: {pronoun_cap} waits. People find this either reassuring or unsettling.
personality_lines.ambitious: {pronoun_cap} has plans that {town} may not be large enough for.

hooks: {pronoun_cap} saw something last month that {pronoun} hasn't told anyone.
An old connection has shown up in {town} and it's unclear if {pronoun} is glad about it.
{pronoun_cap} knows something about someone else in {town} and wonders sometimes whether to say it.
Something has changed recently in how {pronoun} acts, and {pronoun_pos} closer neighbors have noticed.
{pronoun_cap} is waiting for something. {pronoun_cap} hasn't said what.
